scoring_notes: Locked canonical 2026 derived split record. permit_status=TOTAL_ONLY; allocation_type=DRAW_TOTAL_ONLY.

recommended_permits.permit_note: 2026 total allotment from Utah DWR Hunt Planner export 2026_deer_buck_limited_entry.csv; no resident/nonresident split published in this source.

resident.projection_method: 2025 odds carry-forward, remove winners, hold 0-point baseline flat, evaluate one focal applicant against 2026 permits
